Required field presence check.
Observed type must match contract type.
Numeric range must remain within contract bounds.
Each event must expose a stable UUID event identifier.
Each event must link back to a UUID aggregate identifier.
Aggregate types must stay within the modeled bounded context set.
Event names should remain PascalCase so downstream schema routing stays deterministic.
Business occurrence timestamps must be valid date-times.
Ledger write time must not precede the business event time.
Sequence numbers must start at 1 and stay positive.
Sequence numbers must be monotonic within each aggregate stream.
Schema versions must stay within supported major.minor contract versions.
Each event must retain a correlation id for cross-service tracing.
ApplicationSubmitted events must carry a positive requested amount.
Document-related events should reference PDF assets so extraction lineage can be reproduced.
Event records must preserve causal ordering.
